subject: [AAI][GRAPHADMIN] Automatically retrieve certs
commit_message:
[AAI][GRAPHADMIN] Automatically retrieve certs

Instead of using hardcoded certificates, use certInitializer in order to
retrieve them automatically.

Issue-ID: OOM-2690
Signed-off-by: Sylvain Desbureaux <sylvain.desbureaux@orange.com>
Change-Id: If919336570e54da30a6ad7c663408f9d2f8af00d
